paper_focus.title: Enhancing strength and ductility in Fe–20Mn–9Al-1.5C austenitic low-density steels through Ni and Cr alloying synergy adding
paper_focus.research_objective: To develop a Fe–20Mn–9Al-1.5C austenitic low-density steel with density below 6.8 g/cm³ that overcomes the strength-ductility trade-off through synergistic Ni and Cr alloying and ultra-fast cooling, and to elucidate the corresponding strengthening and deformation mechanisms.
material_systems: Fe–20Mn–9Al–1.5C (wt%) austenitic low-density steel alloyed with Ni and Cr
long-range ordered (LRO) domains with L1₂ structure
main_process_variables: alloying concentrations of Ni and Cr
tensile deformation to various cumulative strains
